summary: Tested Shopify Products page, webhooks, OAuth, and platform connections. All 14 backend tests pass. Frontend UI verified: Shopify Products page shows empty state with 'Sync Products' button, sidebar nav link active, error toast on sync attempt. Platform Connections page shows Shopify card with domain input + 'Connect with Shopify' button.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Shopify features working correctly. Webhooks return 401 with invalid HMAC as expected. OAuth init returns correct Shopify authorize URL. Sync products shows error toast when no store connected.

backend_api_tests.POST /api/shopify/oauth/init: PASS - Accepts shop_domain, returns oauth_url with correct Shopify authorize URL
backend_api_tests.GET /api/shopify/synced-products: PASS - Returns empty products list when no synced products
backend_api_tests.POST /api/shopify/sync-products: PASS - Returns success=false with error when no connection
backend_api_tests.GET /api/oauth/platforms: PASS - Returns all platforms, Shopify has oauth_ready=true
backend_api_tests.GET /api/connections/platforms: PASS - Returns all platforms with oauth_ready enriched

frontend_ui_tests.Sidebar nav link 'Shopify Products': PASS - Link exists and is active when on page
frontend_ui_tests.Empty state 'No Products Synced Yet': PASS - Shows when no products synced
frontend_ui_tests.Sync Products shows error toast: PASS - Shows 'No Shopify store connected' toast
frontend_ui_tests.Connect with Shopify button: PASS - Green button with link icon

features_verified: Shopify Products page (/shopify-products) - renders with dashboard layout, shows empty state
Sidebar navigation link 'Shopify Products' exists and is active
'Sync Products' button in empty state card works (shows error toast)
GET /api/shopify/synced-products - returns empty list when no synced products
POST /api/shopify/sync-products - returns success=false with error when no connection
All 4 webhook endpoints return 401 with invalid HMAC
Platform Connections page - Shopify card shows domain input + 'Connect with Shopify' button
Login and authentication flow works correctly
